sentences.text: you like what written by nigel pepper house focus question what are some surprising foods that children like to eat
this girl likes crickets do you
this girl likes fish eggs do you
this boy likes water bugs do you
this boy likes meal worms do you
this girl likes flowers do you
this boy likes spiders do you
this girl likes squid well maybe not

connections writing and art which of the foods in the book would you try why draw a picture and write about it science sort the foods from the book into different groups share your groups with a partner
